case_title: EMILIO A. RAMIREZ VS. ARWIN FUYU HO

docket_entries.description: EXHIBITS RETURNED TO PLAINTIFF RAMIREZ, EMILIO A.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RAMIREZ, EMILIO A. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT HO, ARWIN FUYU DBA  NEW ERA CONSTRUCTION COMPANY ALTHOUGH THE COURT FINDS THAT PLAINTIFF PERFORMED SERVICES UNDER DEFENDANT'S CONTRACTOR'S LICENSE, THE EVIDENCE DID NOT ESTBALISH THAT PLAINTIFF WAS TO BE PAID AN HOURLY WAGE, OR THAT HE WAS NOT FULLY COMPENSATED BY MR. LIU. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED SERVED MAY-29-2010, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT HO, ARWIN FUYU DBA  NEW ERA CONSTRUCTION COMPANY
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-28-2010 - JUDGMENT.
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF RAMIREZ, EMILIO A. AS TO DEFENDANT HO, ARWIN FUYU DBA  NEW ERA CONSTRUCTION COMPANY
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,000.00 FILED BY RAMIREZ, EMILIO A. AS TO DEFENDANT HO, ARWIN FUYU DBA  NEW ERA CONSTRUCTION COMPANY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-28-2010 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-28-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-28-2010 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. CARMEN ESCOBAR INTERPRETS ENGLISH/SPANISH - SPANISH/ENGLISH ON PLAINTIFF'S BEHALF. KEN LEE INTERPRETS ENGLISH/CANTONESE - CANTONESE/ENGLISH ON DEFENDANT'S BEHALF. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
